text.title: AI Overview Monitoring Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the weekly snapshot shape, trend report, and action-log structure.

section.title: Required weekly-snapshot fields

list.item: week_iso (string, ISO week label e.g. 2026-W23)
scrape_started_at_utc + scrape_completed_at_utc
queries (object: query_text → status_per_source)
queries..aio: enum {cited, not_cited, partial, error}
queries..perplexity: enum {cited, not_cited, partial, error}
queries..chatgpt_search: enum {cited, not_cited, partial, error}
queries..evidence: { citation_snippet, citation_url } per source where cited
adapter_versions: object with each scraper's version

section.reference: Authoritative JSON Schema for the weekly snapshot.

list.item: 4-week rolling window per query and per source.
Deltas tagged: new_citation, lost_citation, sustained_citation, sustained_absence.
Cross-source quorum: queries cited by >= 2 of 3 are flagged "stable"; queries with mixed cite/no-cite across sources flagged "volatile".
action_id + taken_at_utc
ladder_step: enum L1..L6
trigger: reference to the snapshot delta
expected_outcome: which source / status the action should restore by which date
marketer_signoff: name + timestamp
validation_status: pending | validated | failed (set after the next snapshot)

antipattern.description: Snapshot overwritten after the scheduled scrape; mtime > scrape_completed_at_utc by >= 1 day.

antipattern.reason: r4 violation. Off-ladder action must update the ladder before becoming routine.
r5 violation. Human gate is required.

antipattern.description: queries object missing one of {aio, perplexity, chatgpt_search} per row.
antipattern.reason: r2 violation. Three sources are required.

list.item: Every priority query has data from all three sources.
Adapter version is recorded.
Trend report is generated within 24h of snapshot.
Every action carries ladder_step + expected_outcome + signoff.
Snapshots committed to git; never edited after the fact.
